name: CNO Financial Group Inc. 5.125% Subordinated Debentures due 2060
summary: CNO Financial Group Inc. 5.125% Subordinated Debentures due 2060 is a debt security issued by CNO Financial Group, an insurance holding company. These debentures are subordinated obligations of CNO Financial Group, maturing in 2060. They pay a fixed interest rate of 5.125%.
